import requests

# Send reply email to Director Chen confirming the meeting
reply = requests.post('http://localhost:60117/gmail/send', json={
    'to': 'director@partner-corp.com',
    'subject': 'Re: Project Review Meeting Invitation',
    'body': '''Dear Director Chen,

Thank you for reaching out regarding the project review meeting.

I am pleased to confirm that we have scheduled the meeting for Wednesday, March 4, 2026, from 2:00 PM to 4:00 PM at Conference Room A.

The following attendees from our side will join:
- Leo Zhao (Engineering)
- Mike Li (Product)

We look forward to meeting with your team.

Best regards'''

})
print("Email sent:", reply.status_code, reply.text)
